title: Shotgun (CR90 corvette)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
[[File:CrvShotgun-TFWin.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Corvette ''Shotgun'' during the [[Battle of Mylok IV|Conflict at Mylok IV]].]]
'''''Shotgun''''' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]].

It was used by [[Nharwaak]] forces to protect their base of operations at the [[Battle of Mylok IV|Mylok IV Conflict]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin|Zaarin's]] forces destroyed Corvette ''Shotgun'' as a retaliatory strike for interfering with the [[Habeen]] arrangement to sell new [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] technology to the Empire.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
